summary:
Lane DC-001: Extracted Electron assumptions from config resolution behind a PlatformPaths interface.

Created `packages/desktop/src/main/platform-config.ts` with:
- PlatformPaths interface: getPath(), setPath(), isPackaged, getVersion(), getName(), getAppId()
- ElectronPlatformPaths: wraps Electron app APIs (singleton: electronPlatformPaths)
- BrowserPlatformPaths: browser-compatible fallback (singleton: browserPlatformPaths)

Refactored store.ts: replaced `import { app } from "electron"` + `app.getPath("userData")` with `platformPaths.getPath("userData")`, added `setStorePlatformPaths()` injection point.
Refactored constants.ts: added `setConfigPlatformPaths()` and `updaterEnabledForPlatform()` function; deprecated `UPDATER_ENABLED`.
Refactored app-config.ts: added `getAppIdentityForPlatform()` function; deprecated `getAppIdentity()`.

All changes are additive — dirty files (index.ts, server.ts, sidecar.ts) preserved, untracked new files (app-config.ts, ipc-channels.ts) preserved. No new typecheck errors.
